findings.description: The document reference display text is '帳票アプリケーション開発ガイド' in the knowledge file, but the source RST display text is '帳票アプリケーションガイド' (without '開発'). The knowledge file appears to have adopted the filename's text ('帳票アプリケーション開発ガイド.docx') instead of the actual link label used in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `:download:\`帳票アプリケーションガイド <development_guide/帳票アプリケーション開発ガイド.docx>\``
